name: tucanos-racing-br
description: Comunidade de Automobilismo Virtual - TUCANOS CUP

scripts.build:verify: vite build && test -d dist && echo 'dist folder exists'
scripts.build:check: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); console.log('public exists:', fs.existsSync('public')); fs.existsSync('public') && console.log(fs.readdirSync('public'));"
